playlist_title: New York Conference • January 26, 2013 - “A New Paradigm to Save Mankind”

videos.title: Helga Zepp LaRouche: Keynote Address to New York Conference • Jan. 26, 2013
videos.description:
Helga Zepp LaRouche reminds to audience what is at stake in the geo-political situation today as well as what the needed remedies are for recovery.  Nothing short of a New Paradigm led by classical artistic composition can bring the world out of it's current state of crisis.
--
Schiller Institute Conference • Riverside Church, New York City • January 26, 2013

videos.title: Bruce Fein: Mankind On The Stage of History — How Will We Be Remembered?
videos.description: Bruce Fein, a former U.S. Department of Justice official and a renowned Constitutional lawyer, explains that mankind is not simply an animal.  He expounds on his concept of the meaning of life and why the principles of our constitution are an expression of mankind's reason.

videos.title: Congressman Walter Jones: Address to Schiller Conference
videos.description:
Over 300 political activists and diplomats, gathering in New York City on Jan. 26 for a conference of the Schiller Institute, unanimously endorsed a call by Rep. Walter Jones (R-NC) to mobilize support for two important legislative initiatives now before the 113th Congress. 1) House Concurrent Resolution 3, dealing with re-asserting the War Powers of Congress, 2) House Resolution 129, to re-instate Glass-Steagall.

1.) "H. Con. Resolution 3" a bill that prevents the president from unathorized war under grounds of impeachment.
2.) H.R. 129 to reinstate Glass-Steagall

L. Beethoven: Sonata for Cello and Piano No. 4 in C Major, Op. 102, No. 1
videos.description:
The Schiller Institute presents L. Beethoven's Sonata for Cello and Piano No. 4 in C Major, Op. 102, No. 1

Performed by: MyHoa Steger (piano) & Jean-Sébastien Tremblay (cello)
1.Andante — Allegro vivace
2.Adagio — Tempo d'Andante — Allegro vivace. Composed in 1815, published in 1817 with a dedication to the Countess Maria von Erdödy.

videos.title: Lynn Yen - The Work of the Foundation for the Revival of Classical Culture

chapters.title: The Transformative Power of Classical Music

videos.description:
Lynn Yen, Executive Director at Foundation for the Revival of Classical Culture, gives an account of the power of Classical Music in society today.
